refined_caption: A rodent is visible in the hospital room, with a person in the background. The rodent appears to be roaming freely in the room.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see a rat in my hospital room, it was running around on the floor while I was trying to rest. This is completely unacceptable and I'm worried about my health and safety. The hospital needs to take immediate action to address this issue.
voice_text: There's a rat in my hospital room, I'm really concerned about the cleanliness and safety of this place.
